message:
Refactor navigation styling with semantic tokens

Create semantic navigation tokens (--tnz-nav-link, --tnz-nav-link-hover,
--tnz-nav-link-active) to unify styling across navbar and sidebar components.
Reduce sidebar width from 18.75rem to 16rem and align sidebar font sizes with
topic navigation using --tnz-text-sm. Remove redundant light/dark mode overrides
by centralizing color definitions in the semantic tokens.
